evidence: standards/enterprise/swift-6-concurrency.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: An unstructured or detached task requires an explicit owner, bounded lifetime, failure policy, cancellation policy, and justification for unavailable structured ownership.
statement: Asynchronous work MUST use structured concurrency by default; every unstructured or detached task MUST have a named owner, bounded lifetime, completion policy, and cancellation path.
